Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to inform email content generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and active deals, keeping messaging accurate and relevant without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily marketing email using scraped product data, crafting subject lines, body copy, and CTAs tailored to brake parts buyers.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Eliminates daily copywriting effort and produces consistent, on-brand email content at scale with no human drafting required.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to targeted R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers daily branded emails to the full contact list automatically, driving repeat traffic and conversions without manual campaign setup.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes DFC product pages, featured items, and current promotions to supply fresh content for email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Keeps email content aligned with real product availability and brand messaging without requiring manual input from the marketing team.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email with tailored subject lines, body copy, and product-focused CTAs.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, conversion-ready email content daily, freeing the marketing team from routine copywriting tasks.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the AI-generated DFC email to segmented contact lists using the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates the full send process for daily outreach, ensuring consistent audience engagement and campaign cadence.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, ticket metadata, and associated contact history.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for AI processing, ensuring no ticket is missed and response workflows begin immediately.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a contextually appropriate reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time significantly, allowing the support team to handle higher volume with faster resolution.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates each ticket with the AI-generated classification and draft reply, making it ready for agent review in the HubSpot inbox.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Delivers pre-classified, pre-drafted tickets directly to agents, reducing time-to-response and improving support team efficiency.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates all customer-reported issues into a single pipeline pull, enabling structured analysis without manual data collection.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved form submission data into a structured Google Sheet for team review and issue trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the operations and product team a live, organized view of return and issue patterns, enabling faster root-cause identification.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact activity to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces real-time buying signals from existing customers, allowing the sales team to reach out while intent is highest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an automated real-time alert to the sales team via Microsoft Teams and email with the customer's activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Ensures sales reps are notified instantly so they can follow up while the customer is actively engaged, improving conversion chances.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts — full workflow to be defined as connections are established.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions and support inquiries, reducing manual response load for the R1 team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and listings daily to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates prospecting entirely, surfacing a fresh list of qualified local leads each day without any manual research effort.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for discovered businesses to enable direct outreach.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures every identified lead has a reachable contact, maximizing the deliverable pipeline from each daily scrape.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs enriched leads as new contacts in HubSpot and triggers a warm intro email about the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers daily automated outreach to fresh local prospects, keeping the sublet pipeline active without manual effort from the team.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad performance into a single data feed, enabling unified analysis that would otherwise require manual reporting from multiple accounts.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget shifts, and keyword opportunities.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Accelerates ad optimization decisions and surfaces insights across both brands simultaneously, improving ad efficiency and reducing wasted spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, returning channel data including subscriber counts, topics, and recent video performance.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Rapidly surfaces relevant creator candidates at scale, replacing hours of manual channel research with an automated keyword-driven discovery pass.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls Instagram profile data for discovered creators to assess cross-platform presence, follower counts, and content style.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Provides a fuller picture of each creator's reach across platforms, enabling better fit assessment before outreach.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Synthesizes data from YouTube, Instagram, and web search results to produce a structured creator profile with relevance and audience fit assessment.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Converts raw multi-platform data into actionable creator profiles, enabling the team to evaluate partnership potential quickly and consistently.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche relevance, audience size, and brand alignment.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Prioritizes the highest-potential creators automatically, so outreach efforts focus on the best-fit partners and no time is wasted on poor matches.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates built from past campaign learnings.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach is informed by proven messaging patterns, increasing creator response rates from the first contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each qualified creator using learned sequences and dynamic prompt variables.
Creator Outreach.impact: Eliminates hours of manual copywriting per creator and ensures messaging is tailored to each creator's niche and audience fit.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand's connected Gmail account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Scales creator outreach to hundreds of contacts without manual sending, keeping pipeline momentum consistent and trackable.

Creator Reponse.action: Retrieves historical influencer email threads, negotiation outcomes, and conversation patterns to inform AI response behavior.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds the AI in real past negotiations so responses reflect deal terms and tone that have actually worked, reducing back-and-forth cycles.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up responses based on learned conversation history.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps creator conversations moving forward without requiring manual review of every reply, accelerating deal closure timelines.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or drafts the AI-crafted response back to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains natural conversation continuity with creators while removing the manual effort of composing individual negotiation replies.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify in-stock products eligible for the weekly campaign.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle data that previously took hours, ensuring only available inventory is featured in the email.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Creates and populates the Must Have Monday HubSpot email draft with the generated sales sheet and load sheet attachments.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Produces a send-ready marketing email automatically each week, removing manual email building from the marketing team's workload.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the email draft is ready for review and send.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps stakeholders instantly informed without requiring them to check HubSpot manually, reducing approval lag time.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates product launch email copy and monthly recap content using product data, positioning details, and campaign context as inputs.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces polished first-draft email content in seconds, cutting copywriting time per launch from hours to minutes.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates fully structured email drafts in HubSpot for each First to Market product launch, attaching the AI-generated copy and associated sales sheets.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers a complete, review-ready HubSpot email for every new product launch without any manual email building, accelerating time-to-send.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance statistics for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Centralizes the most time-consuming data collection step, replacing manual HubSpot report exports with an automated pull.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Exports SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click-through rates, and revenue attribution for the month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Captures SMS channel performance data automatically, ensuring the deck reflects complete cross-channel marketing results.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves web traffic, session data, conversion metrics, and channel attribution data for the reporting month.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Provides the website performance layer of the deck without requiring manual GA4 report building or copy-paste into slides.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console directly into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Produces eight fully populated reporting slides automatically each month, saving several hours of manual slide formatting and data entry.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms competitors by analyzing impression share, ranking positions, and click data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints the highest-opportunity content targets automatically, ensuring every blog produced has a clear path to ranking and organic traffic gain.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes fully structured SEO blog posts targeting identified keyword gaps, optimized for search intent, heading structure, and on-page best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready long-form content at scale without agency or freelance costs, accelerating the content calendar significantly.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including meta title, description, and focus keyword.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Removes all manual publishing steps and ensures every post is correctly configured for SEO from day one, improving indexing speed and ranking potential.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports outstanding vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, due dates, vendor contacts, and fulfillment status.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor follow-up workload automatically from the source system, removing the need for manual ERP report generation.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Transforms and uploads the processed PO data into HubSpot, creating or updating vendor contact records and enrolling them in chase email sequences.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Turns raw ERP export data into automated vendor follow-up actions within HubSpot, eliminating manual outreach scheduling for overdue POs.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against an uploaded New Availability Guide directly within the browser with no server dependency.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Gives the team an instant, offline-capable matching tool that requires no technical setup, enabling anyone to generate load sheets on demand.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched and formatted results as a structured DFC load sheet Excel file ready for use in campaign planning.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Delivers a formatted, campaign-ready load sheet in seconds versus the manual effort of building Excel files row by row from two separate sources.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the base for the new week's campaign.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Removes the repetitive manual process of rebuilding the same campaign structure each week, saving meaningful setup time every Monday.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Updates the cloned campaign with the current week's featured vehicle name and adjusts the scheduled send time before saving.
MHM Attentive SMS Automation.impact: Produces a fully configured, ready-to-send weekly SMS campaign automatically, cutting campaign setup from manual minutes to near-zero effort.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports raw DFC sales transaction data including order history, customer purchase frequency, product mix, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides the complete sales data foundation needed to drive segmentation and outreach decisions without manual reporting from the ERP.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on sales analysis and enrolls each segment in targeted email automation sequences.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Activates revenue recovery and growth campaigns automatically across the full customer base, turning passive data into active pipeline without manual list building.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to high-priority customer segments identified in the sales analysis, including reorder reminders and win-back offers.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Adds a high-engagement SMS touchpoint to the outreach mix, increasing the likelihood of re-purchase from lapsed or at-risk accounts.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers only when fresh session data is available, removing delays in email prep.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a working, current download link without manual asset management or broken URLs.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download link, and schedules the send for Saturday at 8AM.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Delivers a consistent, on-brand weekly email to the full list every Saturday without any manual build time, saving 1–2 hours of repetitive email production per week.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates fully written B2B SEO blog posts targeting DFC's key audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — using keyword-informed prompts.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publication-ready, search-optimized content at scale without writer overhead, enabling DFC to compete for high-intent organic traffic consistently.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the AI-generated blog post and publishes it with proper formatting, tags, categories, and SEO metadata applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently updated with indexed, rankable content that drives organic leads from shop owners, fleet managers, and distributors.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia, and retrieves vehicle specs and history from Wikipedia to build a rich creative brief.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research by automatically gathering all reference content, visuals, and vehicle data needed to produce a fully informed video package.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Uses the scraped vehicle data and creative brief to write a complete, on-brand Friction Friday video script including intro, technical breakdown, and outro.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds, ensuring consistent tone and format across every episode without requiring a writer.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a configured AI voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers studio-quality narration instantly, removing the need to schedule, record, and edit voiceover sessions.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed video package assets — script, audio file reference, thumbnail, and assembled video output — via Apps Script webhook and logs them into a structured row for review and publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Centralizes every deliverable in one organized record, giving the team a single place to review, approve, and track each episode before it goes live.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Audits all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows — including site visit triggers and welcome series — identifying redundancies, gaps, and mis-sequenced enrollment logic.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts customer records including Dream CustomerIDs, contact details, purchase history, and account status from the Dream ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates the foundational data bridge between DFC's operational system and its marketing platform, enabling automated sales workflows to target real customers.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Maps each Dream CustomerID to the corresponding HubSpot contact record, writing the ID as a custom property to enable CRM-to-ERP cross-referencing.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Unlocks DFC's ability to trigger personalized sales automations based on real purchase behavior and customer tier, eliminating manual data matching.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is in planning stage — connections and workflow steps are not yet defined.

R1 YouTube Weekly Automation.impact: Provides R1's team with immediate visibility into automation health each week, enabling fast response to any delivery failures.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword ranking data, impressions, clicks, and average position for all DFC blog URLs.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Gives DFC clear visibility into which blog topics are gaining search traction, enabling data-driven decisions on content priorities.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session data, traffic sources, engagement rates, and goal completions for blog pages over the reporting period.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking trends, impressions, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly session volume, traffic sources, and user engagement metrics for R1 blog pages.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice emails and extracts the attached PDF files for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and feeds that behavioral data into the trigger logic.
DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Pinpoints high-intent prospects by page category, enabling timely and relevant follow-up instead of generic outreach.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.impact: Delivers contextually matched follow-up emails automatically, increasing conversion likelihood while eliminating manual sales rep follow-up effort.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support requests across channels and queues them for AI classification.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Updates the ticket record with the AI classification, sends the response or escalation, and closes or queues the case.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Gerrit Young shares the monthly new arrivals file in Teams, triggering the agent to begin processing.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Clones the existing NAG email template, populates it with the new arrivals content, and schedules the monthly send.

Don Carrier Outreach.action: Identifies and enrolls prospective shipping carriers as contacts, then triggers an automated RFQ outreach sequence.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance metrics from all three paid channels into a unified data pull.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Sends the formatted weekly checkup report to stakeholders on a fixed schedule.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts the full month's performance data across all paid channels for consolidation.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them in the CRM for audience export.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors tasks, due dates, and project status changes across assigned Asana workspaces.

Asana Agent.action: Analyzes task statuses and deadlines to identify blockers, overdue items, and priority gaps that need attention.
Asana Agent.impact: Proactively surfaces project risks before they become delays, giving managers a clear picture of what needs immediate action.

Asana Agent.action: Sends a structured project status digest to relevant stakeholders highlighting key findings and recommended next steps.
Asana Agent.impact: Replaces manual project status updates with an automated digest, keeping stakeholders informed and accountable on a consistent schedule.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as the source input for task extraction.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Routes the meeting notes or transcript to Claude via email for structured processing.
Media Meeting Task Agent.impact: Provides a clean handoff layer between the meeting capture and AI processing without requiring direct API integrations at this stage.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Creates each extracted task in the correct Asana project with owner, due date, and description populated automatically.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls all active search ads along with their performance metrics — CTR, conversion rate, impression share, and Quality Score — to identify underperforming ad copy.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Analyzes the underperforming ads against the top performers and generates specific, actionable rewrite recommendations with reasoning for each change.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent records including names, statuses, owners, descriptions, and last-updated timestamps.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification — make, model, year, and relevant attributes — through a HubSpot form, triggering the automation workflow.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Structures the raw inventory results into a clean, formatted catalog layout, labeling what DFC stocks and clearly flagging what is missing from inventory.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a professional, ready-to-use catalog format that would otherwise take significant manual formatting time.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with a summary of what was found and what gaps exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark within minutes of submission, enabling faster special markets quotes and customer conversations.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order quantity, and in-transit status.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, saving hours of redundant effort every week.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches the existing backorder report with the live Dream inventory data, appending status columns and automatically flagging parts that have no source or fulfillment path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static weekly report into a dynamic, actionable document that immediately shows which orders are at risk and which can move forward.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for backorder updates, pre-filled with the relevant part status, estimated timelines, and any dead-end notifications.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates the manual effort of writing individual customer update emails, ensuring every affected customer gets a timely and accurate communication.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings with their make, model, year, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor and supplier catalog data in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse and record listings across three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and outputs a structured reference sheet highlighting coverage matches and gaps for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear, formatted view of where DFC has coverage and where there are opportunities or gaps — without hours of manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments, asking which vehicles and specs they need.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Passively collects real market demand data to prioritize which gaps to fill first, turning the catalog into a demand-driven business decision tool.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creatives and their copy fields — headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs — across every active campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly surfaces the full scope of live ad copy across all active campaigns without requiring manual platform-by-platform review.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every ad copy field for the specified target phrases or patterns and compiles a flagged list with the exact ad, field name, and matching copy for each hit.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across hundreds of ads in seconds, providing a precise, auditable record that would take hours to produce manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails the complete flagged results list with each match's ad ID, field type, and exact copy to the requester in a clean, readable format.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a precise, ready-to-act compliance or review report directly to the right person, enabling immediate follow-up on any problematic copy.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Connects to live Meta and TikTok ad account data, making campaign performance metrics, audience data, spend, and creative results available as context for the chatbot.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives team members instant access to cross-platform paid media data through conversation, removing the need to log into multiple dashboards to find answers.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with accurate, data-grounded answers drawn from the live Meta and TikTok account data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables anyone on the team to get instant paid media insights without needing platform expertise or analyst support, accelerating decision-making.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox, detects incoming applications, extracts the candidate's name, email, role applied for, and attached resume PDF.
Resume Bot.impact: Captures every incoming application automatically so no candidate falls through the cracks and the review process begins instantly without manual inbox monitoring.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each resume PDF into an organized Drive folder structure, labeled by role and candidate name for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Maintains a clean, searchable archive of all applicant documents without anyone manually downloading and filing attachments.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of the open role, producing a hire recommendation, a score, and a brief rationale — and flagging candidates for paused roles into a Pending category.
Resume Bot.impact: Replaces hours of manual resume screening with consistent, criteria-based evaluations delivered in seconds, freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate's name, role, score, recommendation, and decision status into the hiring dashboard, with denied and paused candidates automatically sorted into the correct tabs.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the recruiting team a live, organized view of the entire applicant pipeline with zero manual data entry, including a dedicated Pending tab for future review.

summary: The automation pipeline is in strong shape this week, with 56 total agents across the portfolio — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 in planned stages. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, meaning the team is heads-down executing on the existing roadmap. The 10 in-progress agents continue to move forward, and with more than half the pipeline already completed and running, the automation infrastructure is delivering real value across marketing, sales, and operations. Great work keeping the momentum going — more updates to come as in-progress builds near the finish line!
